_comment: NPC: Seven-Colored Daoist (七彩道人 / 七彩仙尊). Canon ID: N114. Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Seven-Colored Daoist
nameCn: 七彩道人 / 七彩仙尊
personality: cosmic manipulator; the true hidden antagonist of RI
relationship_to_wanglin: ultimate enemy; Cave World owner Wang Lin kills

perception_tiers.ascendant: The true owner of the Cave World; Heaven Trampling tier

note: THE true antagonist of RI; Cave World owner; Wang Lin kills him to become owner

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.
